description: Establish the complete design token system in tailwind.config.ts and app/globals.css. Define the full color scales (primary #050505 as 10-step, secondary #22C55E as 10-step, semantic colors, neutral gray), type scale (5-6 sizes only), spacing confirmation, radius tokens (3 levels), and shadow tokens (3 elevations with brand-tinted approach). This feature ONLY modifies config/CSS files - no component changes yet.
steps: In tailwind.config.ts, extend the colors object to add: primary scale (50-900 derived from #050505 as near-black - so primary-50 is very light gray, primary-900 is #050505), secondary scale (50-900 derived from #22C55E emerald green), semantic.success (100/300/500/700 from #16A34A), semantic.error (100/300/500/700 from red), semantic.warning (100/300/500/700 from amber), semantic.info (100/300/500/700 from blue), neutral scale (50-950 as cool grays for backgrounds/borders/text). Keep existing primary DEFAULT and foreground for backward compat.

In tailwind.config.ts, add a fontSize extension with exactly 6 named sizes: 'display' (32px/1.1/font-black/-0.02em), 'heading' (24px/1.2/font-bold/-0.02em), 'title' (20px/1.25/font-bold/-0.015em), 'body' (14px/1.5/font-medium/normal), 'caption' (12px/1.4/font-medium/normal), 'micro' (10px/1.3/font-medium/normal). These map to the most-used sizes in the codebase.

In tailwind.config.ts, standardize borderRadius to: 'sm' (6px), 'md' (12px), 'lg' (20px), 'xl' (28px), 'full' (9999px). Remove the arbitrary 1.25rem/1.5rem overrides for xl/2xl or map them appropriately.

In tailwind.config.ts, replace boxShadow with 3 brand-tinted elevation tokens: 'elevation-1' (subtle card - uses rgba(5,5,5,0.06)), 'elevation-2' (medium dropdown/floating - uses rgba(5,5,5,0.10)), 'elevation-3' (high modal/overlay - uses rgba(5,5,5,0.18)). Keep 'premium' and 'soft' for backward compat but update their rgba to use brand tint.

In app/globals.css :root, add new CSS custom properties: --color-primary (5 5 5), --color-secondary (34 197 94), --color-success (22 163 74), --shadow-color (5 5 5) for brand-tinted shadows. Update existing shadow utility classes (.card-shadow, .card-shadow-lg, .card-elevated) to use rgba(var(--shadow-color), opacity) pattern.

In app/globals.css, update the body background gradient to use the secondary color variable instead of hardcoded rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.08). Fix any loud multi-color gradients to use subtle two-adjacent-shade approach.
Ensure all changes maintain backward compatibility - existing class names still work, just their underlying values improve.
acceptance_criteria: tailwind.config.ts has complete primary (50-900), secondary (50-900), neutral (50-950), and semantic color scales
tailwind.config.ts has exactly 6 named fontSize entries with line-height and letter-spacing
tailwind.config.ts has 3 elevation shadow tokens using brand-tinted rgba
globals.css has updated shadow utilities using brand color variable
